title: USDG second act — PT-USDG as inaugural collateral in Aave V4's Global Dollar Hub
context: Coverage on July 1-2 2026 said Aave V4's Global Dollar Hub launched with PT-USDG-24SEP2026 as inaugural collateral and ~14.8M supplied shortly after launch. Reconciling the hub's actual PT holdings and related supply figures against chain state.

claims.label: PT-USDG held by Aave V4 hub (launch claim: 14.8M)
